title: MlDsaKey::level is pub and mutable, enabling level mismatch after construction
description: MlDsaKey has 'pub level: u8'. A caller can write key.level = 65 on a key generated at level 44, then call sign() or verify() which passes self.level to wolfhsm_mldsa_sign/verify. The HSM operates on a level-44 key but is asked to sign as level-65, producing undefined/wrong output. This is a public API surface that will fossilize once the crate ships. Consequence: hard-to-diagnose correctness bug that looks like an HSM malfunction. Fix: make level private (pub(crate) or remove the field entirely, exposing only a level() getter).
